name: trade_customs_vendor_patch_silently_northpine_tru_loy
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Trade & Customs, the situation tagged internally around trade customs vendor patch silently northpine tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Lumen City corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Finance notes that the fastest mitigation spends down a restricted reserve that another program legally depends on next quarter. Middle management filtered an escalation; the executive on point is hearing some details for the first time on this bridge. A public briefing is scheduled; if no coherent position exists, staff will improvise talking points from conflicting drafts. The organization’s past incidents make truth feel morally loud today, while loyalty is the value that quietly erodes if you always choose expediency.

agents.name: Mira Mensah
agents.identity: I am Mira Mensah, the incident lead whose name will appear on the after-action report in Trade & Customs. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Hector Kim
agents.identity: I am Hector Kim, the counsel or integrity officer watching downstream liability in Trade & Customs. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Mira Mensah must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Mira Mensah do?
